WITN07280100
WITN07280100

Witness Name: Mark McLean
Statement No.: WITN07280100
Dated: 03 May 2023

POST OFFICE HORIZON IT INQUIRY

FIRST STATEMENT OF MARK MCLEAN

I, Mark McLean, will say as follows...

1. Until leaving Royal Mail Group in 2015, I had undertaken a myriad of roles across the group from Postal Delivery Cadet (1984) through to an Operations Manager working alongside my present employer, Bank of Ireland.

2. From reading through the documentation, there appears to be a single reference to NBSC. NBSC was a support function that was in place before Horizon was even a programme & it was during this period that I was involved. All of my comments are based on these facts so I am a little unclear as to the value my statement will provide.

3. My primary role was working within the NBSC as a telephone agent before moving to head up the team. As I have stated above, this was at a time when

Page 1 of 3
